reason: Good person forced to kill one man to save his family, then must live with it

Decent agent must commit murder to protect others, then carries guilt forever
Ordinary man driven to violence to save family, haunted by his act
Right a wrong but cost is a single unspeakable deed and lifelong remorse
Father forced into hideous act for child’s sake, then struggles with self
Investigator coerced into terrible crime to protect family, no redemption
Hero forced to cross moral line for kin, must endure inner damnation
Model mother commits one unspeakable act to save kin, then bears its weight
Desperate father driven to murder to shield child, lives crushed afterward
